metadata.title: Alex Collado | Private Chef
metadata.description: Professional chef services, cooking classes and mezcal experiences

header.title: Chef Alex Collado
header.description: Professional chef services, cooking classes and mezcal experiences for your vacations and private events in Playa del Carmen, Puerto Morelos, Tulum and the surrounding areas.

about.title: About me
about.intro: I deliver the best culinary experience in town, a brief bio...
about.bio: Born in Santa Monica, raised in Mexico and France. Worked in Germany, Poland and San Francisco, CA, with more than eight years of experience in professional kitchens and a Michelin-starred restaurant.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Leave the cooking to us and enjoy your vacation! All my services are customized to your needs using the best local, quality ingredients.

privateChef.title: Private Chef
privateChef.description: I prepare all three or any meal of the day in your own vacation house and take care of the groceries for you based on your needs...

cookingExperience.title: Cooking Experience
cookingExperience.description: Learn the art of Mexican cooking. Entrées, salsas, main courses, desserts and cocktails...

mezcalExperience.title: Mezcal Experience
mezcalExperience.description: Enjoy different types of mezcal, a little bit of its elaboration process and traditional Mexican food...
mezcalExperience.alt: Mezcal experience in Playa del Carmen

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: This is what my clients have said about my work:

testimonial1.name: Ambika Kumar Doran
testimonial1.text: 9 of us rented a house near Playa del Carmen the last week of December and arranged for Alex to cook for us each of the 7 nights we were there. This made what would have been a very good vacation into a great one. All families in attendance come from major US cities with numerous award winning, and even Michelin starred, restaurants - so we have a pretty good benchmark for what is a quality meal. Each of Alex's seven dinners was equal to a fine dining experience but served at our own table...

testimonial2.name: Mallory J.
testimonial2.text: Alex cooked for a group of 8 while we were renting a house in Playa del Carmen and I can't say enough great things about his services. From the initial menu selection to the presentation of meals, Alex was responsive and always gave 5 star service. Alex, and Nancy his assistant, are also so nice and personable, they even offered to pick up groceries for us if we needed anything throughout the weekend and gave us their salsa recipe. I highly recommend their services, you will not be disappointed!

cta.heading: Are you ready for an unforgettable experience?

footer.copyright: © Copyright 2019 by Siria Lerma & Miguel Guerra

privateChef.title: Private Chef
privateChef.text: Leave the hard work to me while you enjoy quality time with friends and family in the comfort of your home or rental, no driving, traffic or waiting for a table! I'll make a menu according to your needs and food preferences using fresh and local ingredients. We take care of everything, we buy the ingredients, cook, serve and clean. Services can be plated, buffet or family style.

cookingExperience.title: Cooking Experience
cookingExperience.text: Learn the art of Mexican cooking! Touch, smell and taste authentic Mexican ingredients, perfect for those interested in Mexican gastronomy and who are curious about it. In the comfort of your home or rental, I'll bring everything we will need to make a Mexican feast. All ingredients included, alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages.

mezcalExperience.title: Mezcal Experience
mezcalExperience.text: Indulge in a unique culinary experience from the comfort of your home or rental. Savor over 10 varieties of delectable mezcal drinks, both straight and cocktails, expertly paired with authentic Mexican cuisine. We will tailor the menu to your tastes and preferences, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the rich flavors of this traditional Mexican drink. Come discover the art of mezcal and Mexican cuisine like never before!

aboutMe.title: Alex Collado
aboutMe.text: I was born in Santa Monica, CA to a Mexican family, then moved to Mexico, France and China. My culinary inspiration comes from the world that surrounds me, mixing traditions and world flavors. Growing up close to my grandmother in Tampico, which belongs to la Huasteca Potosina, from an early age I experienced cooking for large family reunions and holidays, then I decided to study gastronomy in Austin, TX, which granted me the experience of working later in Berlin, Poland and San Francisco and also the experience of working in a Michelin-starred restaurant. All this was exceptionally influential and led me to seek my own path as Private Chef in the paradise called Riviera Maya.

testimonial1Full.text: 9 of us rented a house near Playa del Carmen the last week of December and arranged for Alex to cook for us each of the 7 nights we were there. This made what would have been a very good vacation into a great one. All families in attendance come from major US cities with numerous award winning, and even Michelin starred, restaurants - so we have a pretty good benchmark for what is a quality meal. Each of Alex's seven dinners was equal to a fine dining experience but served at our own table at home without the need to get dressed up or even venture from our abode. He and his partner Nancy worked with us in advance to tailor a menu to fit our needs and he even prepared special vegetarian dishes a few nights for two or three people who didn't want to eat what the rest of the group had chosen. We also had one very particular child with a severe food allergy and Alex went out of his way to cook totally separate meals for him as well. In addition he offered (and we accepted) to do spot grocery shopping for us when we were running low on staples or even when we just decided we wanted something that we hadn't thought to obtain ourselves (like mangoes). But more than just the excellent dinners and the grocery assistance was the sense that Alex and Nancy are just good people who like to cook for others. They were helpful, friendly, courteous and kind - endlessly so. The meals were superb, the leftovers became lunches the next day, the food was creative, presented in visually interesting ways, and universally delicious. And this was the collective judgment of 9 people with very different taste preferences. To be able to satisfy a group as diverse as ours is quite a testament. We would not hesitate to work with Alex again and are even considering flying him to the US for a special event or two where we would want someone to cook for us. He is really that good. Hire him if you can - you won't regret it!
